items.title: Qobuz Connect Gives Older Cambridge Audio Speakers A Boost
items.description: Cambridge Audio adds Qobuz Connect to older StreamMagic hardware. Stream 24-bit high-res audio to your favorite legacy devices.

items.title: Yoko Taro To Create The Scenario For A New ‘Evangelion’ Anime Series
items.description: As part of the 30th anniversary celebration for 'Evangelion', a new anime series was announced with Yoko Taro in charge of the script and scenario.

items.title: ‘Panzer Dragoon Zwei: Remake’ Gets A New Demo On Steam
items.description: After playing the game at last year’s Tokyo Game Show, I was actually quite impressed with the 'Panzer Dragoon Zwei: Remake', and now there’s a demo o...

items.title: Surprising New Trend Of Agentic AI ‘Renting Humans’ To Perform Tasks That The AI Wants Done On Its Behalf
items.description: Agentic AI is renting humans. Yes, AI reaches out to find humans that will perform tasks on behalf of the AI. It's a new trend. An AI Insider scoop.

items.title: The Last Brushstroke: How AI  Is Expanding The World Of Art
items.description: How an AI generated painting sold for half a million dollars — and what it means for the future of art, creativity and business.
